tool_args.label: Safety & Security Committee Meeting - Workplace Violence Update

payload.title: Safety & Security Committee Meeting
payload.description: Committee Update on Workplace Violence Assaults on Employees, including data, ongoing initiatives, and programs across MTA agencies.
New York City Transit Buses department, referenced for workplace violence initiatives including bus operator compartments and Eagle Team expansion.
New York City Transit Subway department, referenced for workplace violence initiatives including conductor cab cameras, platform barriers, and de-escalation training.
MTA Police Department, referenced for workplace violence initiatives including officer training, post incident review, and peer support services.

MTA Metro-North Railroad and Long Island Rail Road, grouped for workplace violence initiatives including customer messaging, incident hotline, conductor conflict resolution training, and police deployments.
MTA Construction & Development, referenced for workplace violence initiatives including employee engagement and safety communications, and worksite assessments and compliance reviews.
MTA Bridges and Tunnels, referenced for workplace violence initiatives including annual reviews with authorized employee representatives and workplace violence prevention training compliance.
